meaning: adj.东的,向东方的,从东方来的
examples: It was a beautiful September day, with stiff easterly winds.
He progressed slowly along the coast in an easterly direction.
The "seesaw" brought cycles of intensely cold winters and easterly winds, then switched abruptly to years of heavy spring and early summer rains, mild winters, and frequent Atlantic waves.
Gates and Easterly quickly got into an argument about the efficacy of aid programs.
The cooperative said the recent strong easterly winds and cold sea temperatures had caused the stranding.
